required_preferences.fact: Now delivers joint training sessions for both legacy and merger partner staff, often in large-group formats, to accelerate standardized process onboarding and ensure consistent adoption.

supersedes.fact: Schedules training sessions for program managers only in small groups—refuses to do large all-staff meetings

required_preferences.fact: Temporarily avoids running altogether—replaces weekend morning runs with doctor-prescribed physical therapy exercises at home

supersedes.fact: Runs only on weekend mornings and strictly on flat neighborhood routes—avoids hilly parks to protect her knees

required_preferences.fact: Uses voice-to-text software for routine emails and note-taking—aims to minimize typing wherever possible on workdays
Checks her email only after her son leaves for school—never before morning family time
Allocates time for assisting her son with homework most evenings—never schedules work tasks during this family window
Uses a digital blood pressure monitor to track readings every morning and logs them in a health app before breakfast—never skips daily monitoring

persona: A finance manager at a nonprofit organization with limited technical resources
